subcategory: 3D WebGL celestial sphere with animated nebula shader
use_cases: Hero section background with animated cosmic visualization
Landing page ambient visual effect for space or tech products
Interactive art installation or digital experience backdrop
Background element for creative portfolio or media websites
Atmospheric visual for gaming or entertainment platforms
ai_summary: A dynamic Three.js WebGL celestial sphere component rendering an animated nebula effect using custom GLSL fragment shaders with FBM noise. Features configurable primary and secondary nebula colors, cloud density control, glow intensity, and rotation speed. Creates an immersive cosmic atmosphere through Fresnel rim glow and layered noise-based cloud generation, suitable as a visually striking background or hero element.
